# fishbc 0.2.2.9001 (2026-07-20)

- Same as previous version.


# fishbc 0.2.2.9000 (2026-07-18)

* Add fledge-bump workflow
* Add fledge-tag-on-merge workflow
* Point fledge-bump caller at the .yaml reusable
* Point fledge-tag-on-merge caller at the .yaml reusable
* ci: Test all R versions on branches that start with cran-
* ci: Tweaks
* ci: Fix comment
* ci: Use workflows for fledge
* ci: Review env vers when installing, more careful foreign runs, format with `clang-format`
* ci: Sync
* ci: Sync
* ci: Always use `_R_CHECK_FORCE_SUGGESTS_=false`
* ci: Only fail covr builds if token is given
* ci: Sync
* ci: Fix
* ci: Add xml2 for covr, print testthat results
* ci: Explain

# fishbc 0.2.2 (2026-07-14)

- Maintainer has been changed to Sarah Lyons
- Update Evan Amies-Galonski email to personal address
- Add/correct author ORCID(s) in DESCRIPTION
- Add CODEOWNERS assigning @SarahLy9


# fishbc 0.2.0

- Alberta fish codes added to freshwater fish data.
- Remove cdc code duplicate for Columbia Sculpin.
- Require R >= 3.4.


# fishbc 0.1.0

- Added `fbc_common_name()` to get common names from codes.


# fishbc 0.0.1

- Initial Release
